name: My Taskbar Farm
short_description: A farm simulator on your taskbar. Bring your taskbar to life by raising adorable farm animals while doing other things.
detailed_description:
My Taskbar Farm is a minimalist idle farming simulator for your taskbar. Perfect for playing while you multitask on your PC.

Raise Farm Animals

Start with a chicken and watch it lay eggs while you work. Unlock new animals as you progress, from adorable cows to fluffy sheep and truffle-hunting pigs.

Automate and Build.

Buy drones to help with gathering resources. Upgrade your little bots for greater efficiency.

Purchase aviaries and barns to free up space and focus production in one place. Upgrade buildings to collect and sell products automatically.

Multitasking:

My Taskbar Farm is designed to sit comfortably on your taskbar, letting you manage your farm while doing other tasks, all without demanding much of your attention.

supported_languages: English, German, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
